name: Risotto Primavera -1
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups shelled fresh peas or frozen, thawed
Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
1/4 cup unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Keep rice immersed in water to avoid discoloration.
2. Cut tomatoes, carrots, and asparagus into 1/4-inch pieces.
3. Bring chicken stock to a simmer in a medium saucepan. Reduce heat to low. Cover and keep warm.
4. Heat olive oil in a large heavy saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and celery and sauté for 3 minutes.
5. Add rice and stir for 30 seconds. Add potatoes, beans, tomatoes, and carrot and sauté for 10 minutes, adding a bit of stock if it becomes too dry.
6. Gradually add 1/2 cup of stock to the rice, reducing heat and simmer until liquid is absorbed, stirring frequently. Continue adding stock in half-cup increments, stirring frequently and allowing each addition to be completely absorbed before adding another.
7. Add artichokes, asparagus, and peas about halfway through the process when more than half the stock has been used. Continue adding stock in the same manner until rice is tender but still slightly firm to the bite.
8. Remove from heat. Season with salt and pepper. Stir in butter, then cheese.
